basic_details.job_title: Central University of Kerala Teaching Recruitment 2026 - 48 Vacancies for Professor, Associate Professor & Assistant Professor
basic_details.short_information: Central University of Kerala (CUK) has released two official notifications dated 10 June 2026 inviting applications for 48 teaching posts across regular departments and the Integrated Teacher Education Programme (ITEP). Online applications open from 11 June 2026 at 4:00 PM and close on 10 July 2026 at 11:59 PM. The hard copy of the application must reach the university by 25 July 2026 at 5:00 PM. Eligible Indian citizens and Overseas Citizens of India may apply online through https://curec.samarth.ac.in.

application_fee.details: The online application fee for Central University of Kerala Teaching Recruitment 2026 is Rs. 2,000/-. Women candidates and candidates belonging to SC, ST, and PwBD categories are fully exempted from the application fee. The fee is non-refundable. | Payment must be made online through Credit Card, Debit Card, NEFT, or Net Banking. A copy of the transaction receipt should be enclosed along with the hard copy of the application.

qualification.details: Several conditions frequently lead to disqualification that candidates should be aware of. Degrees or diplomas obtained from institutions declared fake or derecognized by UGC at the time of obtaining the degree will render the candidate ineligible. The proof of peer-reviewed journal status, Impact Factor, and authorship claims must be supported by valid documents - scores will not be allotted without valid proof. Once appointed, faculty may be required to teach UG, PG, or other programmes and serve at any place/centre as notified by the university, in addition to regular teaching and research duties.

salary_details.details: The pay scales for Central University of Kerala teaching posts are fixed as per UGC/Government of India norms. Appointed candidates will be governed by the National Pension Scheme (NPS), and pay will be revised as per rules issued from time to time. | Note: The ITEP notification does not include a Professor-level post. Associate Professor in ITEP carries the same Academic Level 13A pay scale and Assistant Professor the same Academic Level 10 pay scale as the Non-ITEP posts. | DON'T MISSRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Posts • Technician • RRB29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Vacancies • Nursing Officer13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Openings • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,318 postsKSP Civil Police Constable Online Form 20263,991 Vacancies • Civil Police Constable • KSP03 Jul 20263,991 postsMPSC 2619 Group C Online Form 20262,619 Openings • Group C17 Jul 20262,619 posts

selection_process: Central University of Kerala will shortlist candidates based on their qualifications and experience
and call them for a personal interview. Meeting the minimum prescribed qualifications alone does not guarantee an interview call - where the number of applications is large
the university may restrict candidates to a higher threshold of qualifications and experience at its discretion.

Scrutiny of online applications against prescribed eligibility criteria Shortlisting - based on qualifications and experience beyond the minimum (at university's discretion) Personal Interview - shortlisted candidates are notified by email only; call letters are issued through email only Document verification at the time of interview Medical fitness certificate from the university-specified medical board (if selected and appointed)
SC/ST/PwBD outstation candidates (residing beyond 30 km from the interview venue) who are called for interview will be reimbursed single second-class railway fare from station to station
on production of ticket and proof of category
as per Government of India rules. This concession does not apply to SC/ST/PwBD candidates already in Central or State Government services.

All correspondence from the university - including call letters - will be through email only. Candidates must keep their registered email ID active throughout the recruitment process. Queries may be directed to [email protected].
how_to_apply: This recruitment requires two mandatory steps - submitting the online application AND sending a hard copy by post. Completing only the online form is insufficient; applications where the hard copy is not received in time will be summarily rejected.
Visit the application portal: Go to https://curec.samarth.ac.in (CU Chayan Portal).
Register and fill the online application form for the specific post you are applying for. Note your Online Registration Number.
Upload supporting documents - SC/ST/OBC (Non-creamy layer)/PwBD certificates as applicable, educational qualification documents, experience certificates, and disability certificates (if applicable).
Pay the application fee online (Credit/Debit Card, NEFT, Net Banking) if applicable. Save the transaction receipt.

Candidates already in service must upload an Endorsement/NOC from their employer. If unable to upload at the time of application, upload an undertaking that the NOC/Endorsement will be submitted with the hard copy or at the time of interview. Failure to produce NOC at interview will disqualify the candidate.
Submit the online application before 10 July 2026 at 11:59 PM.

Prepare the hard copy: Print one copy of the completed application form. Attach self-attested copies of all documents claimed in the online application. Number all supporting documents serially; the serial numbers must correspond to the relevant entries in the hard copy.
Superscribe the envelope with: Name of Candidate | Online Registration No | Notification No | Post Applied for.

Dispatch the hard copy by post/courier to: The Recruitment Cell, Central University of Kerala, Tejaswini Hills, Periye, Kasaragod, Kerala – 671325. The hard copy must be received before 5:00 PM on 25 July 2026.
Candidates possessing foreign degrees must submit an Equivalence Certificate from the Association of Indian Universities (AIU) at the time of interview.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply online for Central University of Kerala Teaching Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application is 10 July 2026 at 11:59 PM. However, candidates must also ensure the hard copy of the application reaches the Recruitment Cell, Central University of Kerala, Kasaragod, by 25 July 2026 at 5:00 PM.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in total in CUK Teaching Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 48 teaching vacancies in total — 30 posts under the regular department notification (Non-ITEP) and 18 posts under the ITEP (School of Education) notification. Posts are at Professor, Associate Professor, and Assistant Professor levels.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for CUK Teaching Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application fee is Rs. 2,000/-. Women candidates and candidates belonging to SC, ST, and PwBD categories are fully exempted from the fee. Payment is accepted online through Credit/Debit Card, NEFT, or Net Banking. The fee is non-refundable.

faq.question: Q4. Is the hard copy submission mandatory?
faq.answer: Yes, submission of a hard copy is mandatory for both notifications. Applications will be summarily rejected if the hard copy with all supporting documents is not received at the Recruitment Cell before 5:00 PM on 25 July 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for Professor at Central University of Kerala?
faq.answer: The Professor post carries Academic Level 14 with a pay scale of Rs. 1,44,200 to Rs. 2,18,200. Associate Professor is at Academic Level 13A (Rs. 1,31,400 – 2,17,100) and Assistant Professor at Academic Level 10 (Rs. 57,700 – 1,82,400).

faq.question: Q6. What is the minimum marks requirement for eligibility?
faq.answer: The essential qualification for most posts requires a minimum of 55% marks (or equivalent grade in a point-scale) at the Master's level. A relaxation of 5% (to 50%) is available for SC/ST/PwBD/OBC (Non-creamy layer) candidates. Ph.D. holders who completed their Master's degree before 19 September 1991 also get this 5% relaxation.

faq.question: Q7. What qualifications are needed for ITEP Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: ITEP Assistant Professor candidates need: (i) a PG degree in the relevant subject with at least 55%; (ii) a B.Ed degree with at least 55%; and (iii) either NET qualification or a Ph.D in Education or the concerned subject. For Educational Studies posts, an M.Ed with at least 55% plus NET or Ph.D is required.

faq.question: Q8. Where do I apply for CUK Teaching Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online at https://curec.samarth.ac.in (the CU Chayan Portal). No other mode of application is accepted. After completing the online form, the hard copy must be posted to the Recruitment Cell, Central University of Kerala, Tejaswini Hills, Periye, Kasaragod, Kerala – 671325.

faq.question: Q9. Is there an age limit for CUK Teaching Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The notification does not specify any age limit for these teaching posts.

faq.question: Q10. Are candidates from previous cancelled advertisements required to reapply?
faq.answer: Yes. A previous advertisement (CUK/EST/RECRT/TEACH/2023 dated 05 June 2023) for Professor (04), Associate Professor (02) and Assistant Professor (04) posts has been cancelled on administrative grounds. Candidates who had applied against that advertisement and wish to be considered for the fresh posts must apply afresh. However, they need not pay the application fee again if they had already paid for the cancelled advertisement.
